name: novaic
description: NovAIC - Claude Code capabilities with GUI visualization

scripts.tauri:build: if [ -n "$NOVAIC_MCP_VMUSE_REPO" ] && [ -d "$NOVAIC_MCP_VMUSE_REPO" ]; then rm -rf src-tauri/resources/novaic-mcp-vmuse && rsync -av --exclude='.git' "$NOVAIC_MCP_VMUSE_REPO/" src-tauri/resources/novaic-mcp-vmuse/; else echo 'Skipping novaic-mcp-vmuse sync (NOVAIC_MCP_VMUSE_REPO not set or not found)'; fi && cd src-tauri && ./setup-dmg-support.sh && cd .. && env -u CI tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:ios: (test -d src-tauri/gen/apple || env -u CI tauri ios init) && bash scripts/patch-ios-xcode.sh && env -u CI tauri ios build -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.tauri:build:ios:debug: (test -d src-tauri/gen/apple || env -u CI tauri ios init) && bash scripts/patch-ios-xcode.sh && env -u CI tauri ios build --debug -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.tauri:open:ios: (test -d src-tauri/gen/apple || env -u CI tauri ios init) && bash scripts/patch-ios-xcode.sh && open src-tauri/gen/apple/novaic.xcodeproj
